claims.summary: PI hunting needs actuator-aware anti-windup and bounded integral memory.
claims.disposition: Verified conditional integration, partial decay, integrator leak, and hard clamps.

claims.summary: Gate and filter behavior should remain explicit rather than hidden inside a single pressure scalar.
claims.disposition: Verified separate gate/filter updates and regulator evidence surfaces.

claims.summary: Stability and pressure probes should compare hunting across controller states.
Entropy-scaled viscosity dampening may reduce hunting.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because entropy-scaled damping changes live controller behavior.
